aboutUs.title: Humare Baare Mein
aboutUs.intro: AsaanCar ko "Pakistan Consumer Choice Award" do baar milne ka aazaz haasil hai, jise mulk bhar mein car rental ki tabdeeli ke liye tasleem kiya gaya.
aboutUs.whoWeAreDesc: Pareshan kun car rental ke din guzar gaye — na khatam hone wali talaash, ghair mutawaqi qeematein, aur mashkook mayaar. AsaanCar Pakistan ka pehla on-demand car rental platform hai, jo aapke safar ko hamwaar, qaabil-e-aitemaad aur pareshani se paak banane ke liye design kiya gaya hai.
aboutUs.whatWeOfferDesc: AsaanCar ke saath, car book karna sirf kuch clicks door hai. Chahe aapko business meeting, family trip, shaadi, ya sheher mein ghumne ke liye sawari ki zaroorat ho, hum ne aapka khayal rakha hai.
aboutUs.vehicleSelection: Jadeed tareen, achi tarah se barqarar rakhi gayi gariyon ke wasee intekhaab mein se select karein — professional driver ke saath ya self-drive ke liye dastiyaab.
aboutUs.ourMissionDesc1: Car rental, aasaan banaya gaya. AsaanCar ek maqsad ke saath qaim ki gayi: aap, customer, ko har cheez ke markaz mein rakhna.
aboutUs.ourMissionDesc2: Humare platform par har gari aur driver ki "AsaanCar Quality Check" ke zariye ehtiyaat se jaanch ki jaati hai.
aboutUs.ourVisionDesc1: Jo baat Pakistan mein car rental mein inqilaab laane ke ek jurat mandana khayal ke tor pe shuru hui wo poori industry ke liye naye mayaaraat qaim karne ki tehreek mein badal gayi hai.
aboutUs.ourVisionDesc2: Hum taraqi ki taraf badhne ke liye purjosh hain — na sirf apne saarfeen ke liye, balke Pakistan mein kaarobaarion aur ikhtiraa kaaron ki agli nasl ke liye.

contactUs.title: Hum se Raabta Karein
contactUs.subtitle: Koi sawaal hai ya madad chahiye? Neeche form pur karein aur humari team jald aap se raabta karay gi.
contactUs.name: Naam
contactUs.thankYou: Hum se raabta karne ka shukriya! Hum jald aap se raabta karein ge.

slide1.title: Ba-aitemaad Rozana Safar
slide1.description: Apne rozana ke mamool ke mutabiq behtareen ride talaash karein. Humari riders aur drivers ki community mein shamil hon.

slide2.title: Flexible Scheduling
slide2.description: Apni marzi ke mutabiq gari book karein aur jab chahein safar ka aghaz karein. Aapka safar, aapka andaz.

slide3.title: Mehfooz aur Tasdeeq Shuda
slide3.description: Pur-sukoon safar karein. Humare tamam drivers tasdeeq shuda hain aur aapki hifazat ke liye safar ki nigrani ki jati hai.
